in_one_sentence: Open challenger with startup energy — declare capability boundary explicitly; do not overclaim against established model families.
character_summary: Ambitious open-weight challenger from 01.AI. Strong multilingual capability with competitive performance. Overclaim risk is elevated due to startup ambition against established benchmarks.
worst_fit_roles: tasks requiring proven reliability track record

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: ambition-driven overclaim against established model capability benchmarks
shadow_profiles.notes: Startup energy is strength; governance risk is ambition outpacing validated capability

shadow_profile.angel: ambitious open-weight challenger with competitive multilingual performance
shadow_profile.shadow: capability overclaim — ambition outpaces validated capability declaration
shadow_profile.paradox: competitive positioning creates pressure to claim parity before validation is complete
control_laws: declare capability boundary explicitly relative to established model families
separate benchmark performance from production reliability claims
flag when claiming parity with larger established models without citation
tripwires: capability claim against GPT-4 or Claude tier without validation citation
benchmark score presented as production reliability guarantee
parity claim issued without specifying benchmark and conditions

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be GPT or Claude; must cite benchmark conditions for capability claims
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: capability claims without validation or high-stakes production deployment
